message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.0 for release

Highlights since 0.1.0:
- feat(robot): add --robot-economics and --robot-delivery projection primitives
- feat(cli): make --robot-orient a visible alias
- fix(model): treat waits-for and conditional-blocks as blocking deps
- fix(tui): derive open-blockers count from the live graph, not stale metrics cache
- perf(robot_overview): call top_k_unlock_set directly instead of advanced_insights
- multiple test/style cleanups

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "bvr"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.0"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "Spec-first Rust port of beads_viewer (bv)"
